title: Hearing
description: A scheduled OATH hearing on an ECB summons — when and where the respondent may appear (in person, by phone, or online) to contest the charges. Canonical schema reconciling the hearing columns of 'OATH Hearings Division Case Status' (jz4z-kudi): Hearing Date/Time, Hearing Status, Scheduled Hearing Location, Hearing Result. Keyed back to the summons by Ticket Number.

ticketNumber.description: 'Ticket Number' — the summons this hearing belongs to.

scheduledHearingLocation.description: 'Scheduled Hearing Location' — the OATH hearing office / borough, or a remote channel.

hearingResult.description: 'Hearing Result' — the outcome once the hearing concludes.
